---
title: "404"
title-block-banner: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        #title-block-header { display: none !important; }
        .nav-footer { display: none !important; }
      </style>
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="page-404">
  <div class="glyph">signal lost<span class="pulse"></span></div>
  <h1>This page didn't compile.</h1>
  <p class="lede">Either the URL drifted, or the entry was never shipped. Either way — back to the log.</p>
  <div class="actions">
    <a href="/">← Return to the log</a>
  </div>
</section>
```
